text:
| `src/cli/pty_cli/tui_render.rs:55` & `:109` | `" [session {codename}]"` row tag | **[USER-FACING]** | agent-instance ordinal label (`display_slug`), or DELETE the tag; raw id only if a correlation tag is wanted |
| `src/cli/admin/tail.rs:214` (import), `:246` (`sess_code` closure), used at `:262,266,330,373,394,411` | `[codename]` session tags on msg/sess/sync/turn tail lines | **[OPERATOR-LOG]** | raw `session_id` (operator correlation) or DELETE | [...] - `src/idref.rs:46-55` `session_label` — `"codename (agent@host)"`, consumed by `format_envelope` (`src/cli/messaging.rs:235`). **[USER-FACING]** Replace with `agent_label`/instance `display_slug` only (drop the codename prefix). [...] - `src/runtime.rs:33-50` `slog()` — `let short = session_codename(session_id); path = logs/{short}.log` at `:36-37`. **[INTERNAL-DEBUG]** — per-session debug log *filename* only, never surfaced as identity. Classification: safe to keep raw `session_id` (or a short hex prefix) as the filename. No identity semantics; lowest-priority. (Note: raw session ids are UUID-shaped and filename-safe.) [...] - **Display surfaces** — stop rendering codenames in tail, TUI, envelopes (`session_label`), `messaging.rs`, debug; switch identity displays to `display_slug()`, operator/debug correlation to raw `session_id`. [...] Assistant: Now `hooks.rs` codename field: [...] Assistant: Now `runtime.rs` `slog` filename — use the raw session_id instead of a codename: [...] - **Display/TUI/tail/debug** (agent) ✅ — codename tags → short raw-id prefix or agent label [...] - **session_start / hooks responses + logs** (me) ✅ — `codename` field & log dropped
- **slog filename** (me) ✅ — raw `session_id`
